title: Braised Cabbage with Russian Stew Cream
description: A hearty, comforting dish made with tender cabbage and a rich, creamy Russian stew sauce.
instructions: In a large pot or Dutch oven, sauté the shredded cabbage in a little bit of oil until softened.
Add the Russian stew to the pot and stir to combine with the cabbage.
Pour in the water and bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the cabbage is tender.
Stir in the heavy cream and continue to simmer for an additional 5-10 minutes, or until the sauce has thickened slightly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
